pwa.installBody: hellomara.netをホーム画面に追加してフルスクリーンのアプリ体験をお楽しみください。
pwa.installDismissAria: インストール案内を閉じる
pwa.iosHintBody: 共有アイコンをタップしてから「ホーム画面に追加」を選ぶとアプリがインストールされます。
pwa.updateBody: Maraの新しいバージョンがあります。

onboarding.welcomePoint1: Your data stays on your device by default.
onboarding.welcomePoint2: Every advanced feature is opt-in and explicit.
onboarding.welcomePoint3: The system gracefully degrades to centralized mode at any time.
onboarding.welcomePoint4: No hidden compute. No background network calls without your say-so.
onboarding.authHelper: Authentication is required for all advanced features. Guest visitors can browse but cannot enable P2P or distributed routing.
onboarding.authOtpSent: We sent a code to {{email}}. In dev the code is logged to the server console.
onboarding.consentHelper: Pick exactly which optional features you want to enable. Without consent the system stays in centralized-only mode — the safe default.
onboarding.consentTerms: I have read the privacy & consent terms and I understand I can revoke any of these choices at any time from the transparency dashboard.
onboarding.modeHelper: You can switch modes at any time from the transparency dashboard.
onboarding.activateHelper: Activating starts the AI router, the internal event bus, and (if enabled) the P2P node registry. Local storage sync begins after activation. Nothing else will run.
onboarding.p2pDesc: Allow Mara to coordinate structured event/message exchange with peer nodes.
onboarding.backgroundDesc: Permit Mara to remain a P2P node when the app is in the background.
onboarding.aiRoutingDesc: Allow the hybrid router to dispatch AI calls across local / central / P2P.
onboarding.notificationsDesc: Permit native browser notifications for chat replies and platform events.
onboarding.modeCentralizedBody: Default safe mode. Mara routes every request through the central engine. No P2P, no background work.
onboarding.modeHybridBody: Local-first with optional P2P participation. Mara may share parts of the load with peer nodes you trust.
onboarding.modeAdvancedBody: Full participation in the distributed mesh — you contribute bandwidth and idle compute back to the network.

chatbox.offline: Mara server is offline or unreachable.
